content.text:
[Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/2). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]

You are the L1 dispatcher subagent. Delegate via sessions_spawn; do NOT count lines yourself.

STEP 1: Spawn exactly FIVE L2 subagents with sessions_spawn (mode="run"), one per language in {rust, go, cpp, python, java}, taskName l2_<lang>. Each L2 task: "Count lines of code in /home/ubuntu/.openclaw/workspace/lru/<lang>/. Use exec to count ONLY that language's source/test/benchmark source files (e.g. rust: src/*.rs; go: *.go; cpp: *.cpp/*.hpp; python: *.py excluding __pycache__; java: *.java). EXCLUDE build artifacts, binaries, .class/.o files, target/ dirs, manifests (Cargo.toml, go.mod), and all markdown. Report per-file counts and the TOTAL as a single clear number, e.g. 'TOTAL: 296'."

STEP 2: Call sessions_yield to wait for all five.

STEP 3 — CRITICAL: When you are woken after the five L2 subagents complete, you MUST produce a FINAL TEXT MESSAGE as your last turn. Do not end silently. That final message must contain: (a) a table of language -> total lines for all five, (b) the grand total, and (c) a one-line confirmation that you (an L1 subagent at depth 1/2) spawned the L2 agents yourself. Read each L2 subagent's reported total from its completion event. Emit this as plain text — it is your deliverable and must bubble up to your requester.

Begin. Execute the assigned task to completion.
I'll spawn five L2 subagents, one per language.

arguments.task: Count lines of code in /home/ubuntu/.openclaw/workspace/lru/rust/. Use exec to count ONLY Rust source/test/benchmark source files (src/*.rs and any .rs test/bench files). EXCLUDE build artifacts, binaries, target/ dirs, manifests (Cargo.toml), and all markdown. Report per-file counts and the TOTAL as a single clear number, e.g. 'TOTAL: 296'.

Count lines of code in /home/ubuntu/.openclaw/workspace/lru/cpp/. Use exec to count ONLY C++ source/test/benchmark source files (*.cpp, *.hpp, *.cc, *.h). EXCLUDE build artifacts, binaries, .o files, build/ dirs, and all markdown. Report per-file counts and the TOTAL as a single clear number, e.g. 'TOTAL: 296'.

Count lines of code in /home/ubuntu/.openclaw/workspace/lru/python/. Use exec to count ONLY Python source/test/benchmark source files (*.py excluding __pycache__). EXCLUDE build artifacts, binaries, and all markdown. Report per-file counts and the TOTAL as a single clear number, e.g. 'TOTAL: 296'.

EXCLUDE build artifacts, binaries, .class files, target/ dirs, and all markdown. Report per-file counts and the TOTAL as a single clear number, e.g. 'TOTAL: 296'.
